title: actinomeris squarrosa var. alba
intro: Actinomeris squarrosa var. alba is a plant species, also known as the white sea star root, which belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the roots of Actinomeris squarrosa var. alba are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
